---
name: fehem-soft-skill
description: "Use when: the UI should feel calm, premium, and soft with subtle depth, generous whitespace, and restrained motion."
---

# Fehem Soft Skill

## Style Intent
Calm premium product UI with rounded geometry, soft shadows, and breathable spacing.

## Visual Rules
1. Prefer gentle neutral backgrounds with one muted accent.
2. Use larger border radius and low-contrast separators.
3. Keep shadows broad and subtle; avoid harsh outlines and glow effects.
4. Use comfortable vertical rhythm and larger paddings.

## Motion Rules
1. Micro-interactions only; no aggressive animation.
2. Use short spring-like timing for hover/focus transitions.
3. Keep motion purposeful and never distracting.

## Typography Rules
1. Clear headline hierarchy with moderate weights.
2. Body text tuned for readability (`leading-relaxed`).
3. Avoid decorative typography that reduces clarity.
